content.text:
Context: This summary will be shown in a list to help users and Claude choose which conversations are relevant.

Please write a concise, factual summary that synthesizes these part-summaries into one cohesive paragraph. Focus on what was accomplished and any notable technical decisions or challenges. Output in <summary></summary> tags. Claude will see this summary when searching previous conversations for useful memories and information.

Part summaries:
1. User is using a brainstorming skill to redesign a web testing tool. They clarified requirements through guided questions: web-only testing (skipping mobile apps), Tibero DB comparison for AS-IS vs TO-BE validation, JSON-based scenario management (extensible to Tibero later), and integrated web actions + DB queries. The design progressed from exploring 3 comparison approaches to settling on snapshot-based comparison, then evolved to include a two-tier scenario structure (Scenarios containing independent TestCases) with data models for scenarios, test cases, and execution snapshots.
2. 사용자가 웹 애플리케이션 회귀 테스트 플랫폼의 설계 및 구현 계획을 작성했습니다. 초기에는 웹 브라우저만 지원하는 설계였으나, 사용자의 요청으로 Android 네이티브 앱 테스트 지원이 추가되었습니다. Playwright for Android를 사용하여 Android WebView 기반 앱을 ADB(Android Debug Bridge)로 직접 제어하는 방식으로 변경되었으며, iOS는 추후 진행 예정입니다.
3. Reorganized all documentation files under `docs/` into structured `spec/`, `design/`, and `plan/` subdirectories with numbered filenames (01_, 02_, etc.). Created remaining design and plan documents, translated CLAUDE.md to Korean with doc reference tags, and deleted obsolete files. Then debugged and fixed `safereport-safefield-scenario.json` to match the current `TestScenario` type structure—corrected mismatched scenario ID, converted test case IDs to UUID format, removed invalid `target` field, and added null checks in evaluate scripts to resolve 500 errors.

Good:
<summary>Built conversation search system with JavaScript, sqlite-vec, and local embeddings. Implemented hierarchical summarization for long conversations. System archives conversations permanently and provides semantic search via CLI.</summary>

Bad:
<summary>This conversation synthesizes several topics discussed across multiple parts...</summary>

Your summary (max 200 words):

<summary>
Designed and implemented a web regression testing platform with progressive scope expansion. Initial design focused on web-only testing using Playwright with snapshot-based comparison for validating AS-IS vs TO-BE states through integrated web actions and Tibero database queries, structured around JSON-based scenario management. Requirements were clarified through guided questioning, establishing two-tier scenario structure (Scenarios containing independent TestCases) with data models for scenarios, test cases, and execution snapshots. Later expanded to support Android native app testing via Playwright for Android controlling WebView-based apps through ADB, with iOS deferred for future implementation. Reorganized documentation under structured `docs/` subdirectories (`spec/`, `design/`, `plan/`) with numbered filenames for better organization. Fixed the `safereport-safefield-scenario.json` fixture file to match current `TestScenario` type structure by correcting scenario IDs, converting test case IDs to UUID format, removing invalid fields, and adding null checks in evaluation scripts to resolve 500 errors. The platform now supports web and Android testing with extensible architecture for future database and platform additions.
</summary>
